status: superseded by Project Cockpit v3; generated boards removed from Penpot
targetPageName: 01B Shell Context and Accelerator Cockpit v2
sharedShellRequirements: Authenticated boards show a persistent sidebar.
Authenticated top bar shows active context, Light/Dark toggle, user menu, and Logout.
Each route-level board shows an entry path.
The navigation map uses arrows to explain how each shell/state is reached.
Login and logout/session-ended screens hide authenticated navigation.

frames.name: SHELLV2-00 Navigation map
frames.purpose: Explain how users reach each shell/state before reviewing individual boards.
regions: Clarification that 04/05/06 are optional child routes
frames.acceptance: A reviewer can understand how to reach login, cockpit, client overview, Public View, Project Info Hub, and logout/session-ended states.

frames.name: SHELLV2-01 Login
frames.purpose: Authenticate before any client/domain, environment, or public asset access.
frames.acceptance: No module, project, environment, or shared asset data is visible before authentication; success routes to the Cockpit.

frames.name: SHELLV2-02 Logout or session ended
frames.purpose: Confirm session end and remove all scoped data from view.
frames.acceptance: After logout or timeout, no client/domain, environment, module, or secret action appears available.

frames.name: SHELLV2-03 Context and accelerator cockpit
frames.purpose: Select client/domain, environment, or Public View, then launch an accelerator.
frames.acceptance: Module cards launch accelerators without project phase gates; client overview, Public View, Project Info Hub, and logout have visible entry paths.

frames.name: SHELLV2-04 Client environment overview
frames.purpose: Show the selected client/domain across DEV, QAS, PROD, and all-environment view.
frames.acceptance: The overview clarifies environment separation without becoming a project-control dashboard.

frames.name: SHELLV2-05 Public View and shared assets
frames.purpose: Browse shared reusable assets without exposing private client data.
frames.acceptance: Public View is clearly separate from private client/domain data and offers copy/import into an allowed context.

frames.name: SHELLV2-06 Project Info Hub
frames.purpose: Collect useful project references for the active client/domain and environment.
frames.acceptance: Project info is useful and scoped; secret values are never displayed in the wireframe.
